name: RIVERVIEW BANCORP INC
summary: Riverview Bancorp, Inc. is a Washington-based bank holding company for Riverview Bank, a state-chartered commercial bank. It attracts deposits and originates commercial business, commercial real estate, multi-family, construction, residential real estate, and consumer loans in its primary market area of Clark, Klickitat, and Skamania counties (WA) and Multnomah, Washington, and Marion counties (OR). Subsidiaries include Riverview Trust Company, offering trust, asset management, and brokerage services, and Riverview Services, acting as trustee for mortgage deeds of trust.
